name: Heating Equipment (except Warm-Air Furnaces) Manufacturing
rationale: Best fit score of the new markets (5.84) because boiler OEMs already integrate flow sensors; architectural distance=2 makes this the closest adjacency. Incumbent vulnerability only 4.90 since Vortex (SIKA) is entrenched and near-zero-pressure-drop, so differentiation relies on integrated-T and EcoDesign labelling rather than pressure-drop displacement.
entryStrategy: 1) Target tier-2 European condensing-boiler OEMs (Vaillant sub-brands, BDR Thermea marques, Bosch Junkers private-label). 2) Prove parity with SIKA VVX on pressure-drop and accuracy at equal unit cost. 3) Lead with integrated-T + EcoDesign data-out. 4) Complete 6-12 month supply qualification. 5) Scale via existing Marquardt OEM relationships.
